name: Octahedral State
description: Eight discrete positions on an octahedron (+/-x, +/-y, +/-z) encoding 3 bits per unit cell. Derived from silicon's sp3 orbital hybridization at the tetrahedral angle of 109.47°. The quantum mechanical ground state of four-orbital repulsion becomes a natural computational substrate.

core_attributes.pattern: 8-vertex discrete states, O_h symmetry group, 3-bit encoding per unit
